project_description: Private by default. Creative by design. A local-first AI workspace for calm, multi-perspective thinking.
font_family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
sidebar_bg: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 0%, rgba(255, 77, 109, 0.18), transparent 15rem), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(21, 19, 17, 0.94), rgba(8, 7, 6, 0.9))
hero_gradient: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 12%, rgba(255, 77, 109, 0.2), transparent 22rem), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 18%, rgba(47, 211, 227, 0.18), transparent 24rem), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(123, 92, 255, 0.2), transparent 24rem), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(21, 19, 17, 0.82) 0%, rgba(8, 7, 6, 0.92) 100%)

light.font_family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
light.sidebar_bg: radial-gradient(circle at 16% -4%, rgba(47, 211, 227, 0.18), transparent 16rem), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 253, 248, 0.94), rgba(236, 228, 218, 0.88))
light.hero_gradient: radial-gradient(circle at 10% 10%, rgba(255, 77, 109, 0.14), transparent 20rem), radial-gradient(circle at 88% 8%, rgba(47, 211, 227, 0.16), transparent 23rem), linear-gradient(135deg, #fffdf8 0%, #eee5d8 100%)

dark.font_family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif
dark.sidebar_bg: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 0%, rgba(255, 77, 109, 0.18), transparent 15rem), linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(21, 19, 17, 0.94), rgba(8, 7, 6, 0.9))
dark.hero_gradient: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 12%, rgba(255, 77, 109, 0.2), transparent 22rem), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 18%, rgba(47, 211, 227, 0.18), transparent 24rem), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, rgba(123, 92, 255, 0.2), transparent 24rem), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(21, 19, 17, 0.82) 0%, rgba(8, 7, 6, 0.92) 100%)
